course.title: Physics-Inspired Computing for Engineers
course.tagline: Consensus swarms, TSP certificates, blue-noise sampling, cascade risk, and Landauer thermodynamics.

m1.title: Murmuration consensus
m1.concept: Robust DeGroot consensus and Tukey-biweight aggregation over agent estimates.

m2.title: Colony TSP certificate
m2.concept: Nearest-neighbour + 2-opt tour with an admissible optimality-gap bound.

m3.title: Turing blue-noise
m3.concept: Mitchell best-candidate sampling for even-but-irregular point sets.

m4.title: Ablation cascade risk
m4.concept: Abelian sandpile SOC — power-law avalanche sizes and tail risk.

m5.title: Landauer thermodynamic audit
m5.concept: Bit-erasure energy floor kT·ln2 over an operation DAG.

site.quickstart_intro: Clone the repo, install deps, and run labs locally or in Colab.
site.certificate_intro: Complete all labs and exercises to unlock your certificate.
site.certificate_locked: Check off all labs and exercises to unlock
site.footer: Part of the AIMarket ecosystem — Murmuration, Colony, Turing, Ablation, and Landauer oracles as a live sandbox.

exercises.heading: Your turn
exercises.lab01_hint: Verify biweight resists outliers. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m1
exercises.lab02_hint: Confirm gap certificate bounds tour quality. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m2
exercises.lab03_hint: Measure blue-noise minimum spacing. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m3
exercises.lab04_hint: Estimate cascade tau exponent. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m4
exercises.lab05_hint: Audit irreversible bit erasure floor. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m5

lab01_murmuration_consensus.hint: Robust consensus over noisy agent estimates.

lab04_ablation_cascade.hint: Sandpile cascade risk and tail VaR.
